---
title: "graphs"
output: pdf_document
date: "2025-09-24"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)

# read infant and null full graph stats
# Observed infant data
df_infant <- read.csv("../Fig2/data/PanelC/RGB_graphs/graphs_infant_RGB_10pct.csv", na.strings = c("", "NA"))
# Space-only null; (analogous to K=1)
df_S_null <- read.csv("../Fig2/data/PanelC/RGB_graphs/chunkedK1_label_shuffling_graphs_null_RGB_10pct.csv", na.strings = c("", "NA"))
# Space-Time null; K=3
df_ST_null_K3 <- read.csv("../Fig2/data/PanelC/RGB_graphs/chunkedK3_label_shuffling_graphs_null_RGB_10pct.csv", na.strings = c("", "NA"))
# Space-Time null; K=6
df_ST_null_K6 <- read.csv("../Fig2/data/PanelC/RGB_graphs/chunkedK6_label_shuffling_graphs_null_RGB_10pct.csv", na.strings = c("", "NA"))
# Space-Time null; K=9
df_ST_null_K9 <- read.csv("../Fig2/data/PanelC/RGB_graphs/chunkedK9_label_shuffling_graphs_null_RGB_10pct.csv", na.strings = c("", "NA"))

cols_to_remove <- c("proportion_connected_nodes")

df_infant <- df_infant %>% dplyr::select(-all_of(cols_to_remove))
df_S_null <- df_S_null %>% dplyr::select(-all_of(cols_to_remove))
df_ST_null_K3 <- df_ST_null_K3 %>% dplyr::select(-all_of(cols_to_remove))
df_ST_null_K6 <- df_ST_null_K6 %>% dplyr::select(-all_of(cols_to_remove))
df_ST_null_K9 <- df_ST_null_K9 %>% dplyr::select(-all_of(cols_to_remove))
```

```{r}
sort_and_filter_complete <- function(...) {
  dfs <- list(...)
  dfs <- lapply(dfs, function(df) df[order(df$subj, df$category), , drop = FALSE])
  keys <- lapply(dfs, function(df) paste(df$subj, df$category, sep = "\r"))
  stopifnot(all(vapply(dfs[-1], function(df) {
    identical(keys[[1]], paste(df$subj, df$category, sep = "\r"))
  }, logical(1))))
  keep <- Reduce(`&`, lapply(dfs, complete.cases))
  lapply(dfs, function(df) df[keep, , drop = FALSE])
}

dfs_all <- sort_and_filter_complete(df_infant, df_S_null, df_ST_null_K3, df_ST_null_K6, df_ST_null_K9)
df_infant <- dfs_all[[1]]
df_S_null <- dfs_all[[2]]
df_ST_null_K3 <- dfs_all[[3]]
df_ST_null_K6 <- dfs_all[[4]]
df_ST_null_K9 <- dfs_all[[5]]

df_infant$dataset <- "Infant"
df_S_null$dataset <- "K1"
df_ST_null_K3$dataset <- "K3"
df_ST_null_K6$dataset <- "K6"
df_ST_null_K9$dataset <- "K9"

df_all <- rbind(df_infant, df_S_null, df_ST_null_K3, df_ST_null_K6, df_ST_null_K9)
df_all$dataset <- factor(df_all$dataset, levels = c("K1", "K3", "K6", "K9", "Infant"))
```

# normalize to shared scale for visualization
```{r}
features_to_plot <- c("avg_degree") # options: "avg_degree" or "overall_avg_connectivity"
OUT_NAME <- ifelse("avg_degree" %in% features_to_plot, "degree", "connectivity")

name_map <- c(
  "avg_degree" = "Avg Degree",
  "overall_avg_connectivity" = "Connectivity"
)

# do infant and null full graphs
# gather features into long form
df_long_all <- df_all %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = -c(subj, category, dataset), # keep subj, category, dataset, melt the rest
    names_to = "feature",
    values_to = "value"
  ) %>%
  filter(feature %in% features_to_plot)

# sum/mean across subjects per dataset × category × feature
df_sum_all <- df_long_all %>%
  group_by(category, dataset, feature) %>%
  summarise(total_value = mean(value, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

# normalize within each feature × category
df_norm_all <- df_sum_all %>%
  group_by(category, feature) %>%
  # mutate(norm_value = total_value / max(total_value)) %>%
  mutate(norm_value = total_value) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(feature = dplyr::recode(feature, 
  "avg_degree" = "Avg Degree",
  "overall_avg_connectivity" = "Connectivity"
))

df_sd_all <- df_long_all %>%
  group_by(subj, category, feature) %>%
  # mutate(norm_value = value / max(value)) %>%
  mutate(norm_value = value) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  group_by(dataset, feature) %>%
  summarize(sd_ = sd(norm_value), se_ = sd(norm_value) / sqrt(length(norm_value))) %>%
  mutate(feature = dplyr::recode(feature, 
  "avg_degree" = "Avg Degree",
  "overall_avg_connectivity" = "Connectivity"
))

df_avg_norm_all <- df_norm_all %>%
  group_by(dataset, feature) %>%
  summarise(mean_norm_value = mean(norm_value, na.rm = TRUE), sd_norm_value = sd(norm_value, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

df_combined_all <- merge(df_avg_norm_all, df_sd_all, by = c("dataset", "feature"))

######################################
```

```{r}
df_combined_all$dataset <- factor(df_combined_all$dataset, levels = c("K1", "K3", "K6", "K9", "Infant"))
```

## plot
```{r}
library(RColorBrewer)
p <- ggplot(df_combined_all, aes(x = feature, y = mean_norm_value, fill = dataset)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = position_dodge(width = 0.82), width = 0.625, alpha = 1.) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(ymin = mean_norm_value - se_, # sd_norm_value SD across cats or sd_ if corpus level
        ymax = mean_norm_value + se_),
    width = 0.2,                           # horizontal width of error bars
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.82) # matches bar dodging
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(y = NULL, x = NULL, fill = "Distribution") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "Infant" = "#e5b9d6",
    "K1" = "grey50",
    "K3" = "grey60",
    "K6" = "grey72",
    "K9" = "grey85"
      ) 
    ) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 28),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 28),
    axis.text.x  = element_text(size = 24),
    axis.text.y  = element_text(size = 32),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 16),
    legend.text  = element_text(size = 14),
    strip.text   = element_text(size = 16),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_line(color = "grey92"),
    panel.grid.minor.y = element_line(color = "grey95")
) + 
  # scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 1.05),breaks = seq(0, 1.0, 0.25) )
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 15.), breaks = seq(0, 25, 5) ) # if using absolute values
ggsave(paste0(OUT_NAME, "_FigS4_abs_final.svg"), plot = p, width = 9, height = 8, dpi=300, device = "svg")

print(p)
```

```{r}

```
